examples: Go and make one of the men servants bring some in a basket to the rhododendron walk.
Nigel Tompkins spat a cluster of rhododendron leaves out of his mouth.
"The rhododendron ponticum plant is very deceptive, " said the park's head of agriculture and conservation, Rhys Owen.
Walking along the trailside, annoyed at my cold, wet mission, I suddenly noticed a profusion of orange and yellow bell-shaped blooms growing on dwarf rhododendron bushes.
